title: Public Relations Managers
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate activities designed to create or maintain a favorable public image or raise issue awareness for their organization or client.

tasks.text: Assign, supervise, and review the activities of public relations staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with labor relations managers to develop internal communications that keep employees informed of company activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design and edit promotional publications, such as brochures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop and maintain the company's corporate image and identity, which includes the use of logos and signage.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop, implement, or maintain crisis communication plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct activities of external agencies, establishments, or departments that develop and implement communication strategies and information programs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Draft speeches for company executives and arrange interviews and other forms of contact for them.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish and maintain effective working relationships with clients, government officials, and media representatives and use these relationships to develop new business opportunities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate advertising and promotion programs for compatibility with public relations efforts.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Facilitate consumer relations or the relationship between parts of the company, such as the managers and employees, or different branch offices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Formulate policies and procedures related to public information programs, working with public relations executives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Identify main client groups and audiences, determine the best way to communicate publicity information to them, and develop and implement a communication plan.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain company archives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage communications budgets.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage in-house communication courses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Manage special events, such as sponsorship of races, parties introducing new products, or other activities the firm supports, to gain public attention through the media without advertising directly.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe and report on social, economic, and political trends that might affect employers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Produce films and other video products, regulate their distribution, and operate film library.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Respond to requests for information about employers' activities or status.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write interesting and effective press releases, prepare information for media kits, and develop and maintain company internet or intranet web pages.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
